basement.title: Basement & Cellar Insulation
basement.desc: Integrated solutions for insulating basements and cellars from moisture and water leaks with high-quality materials.

foundations.title: Foundation Insulation
foundations.desc: Professional foundation and footing insulation to protect structures from moisture and seepage.
benefits: Longer service life and structural durability

roofs.title: Roof & Annex Insulation
roofs.desc: Insulation for roofs, annexes, bathrooms, and kitchens against heat and moisture.

bitumen.title: Thermal insulation
bitumen.desc: Professional insulation using bitumen rolls to protect buildings from water ingress and moisture.
bitumen.descExtended: Torch-on bitumen membrane is one of the most widely used waterproofing systems. It protects basements, roofs and annexes, bathrooms, and kitchens from moisture and leaks. It is durable (4 mm thickness, 200/250 polyester reinforcement), installed in rolls after priming the substrate for adhesion, followed by a protective finish layer.
cardBullets: Suitable for roofs, basements, and wet areas

pools.title: Swimming Pool Insulation
pools.desc: Professional insulation for swimming pools to prevent leaks and ensure continuous operation. We use specialized materials resistant to water and chlorine.

tanks.desc: Protecting water tanks and gardens from leaks and corrosion with specialized insulation materials.

about.heading: Al Hamra CI for Insulation & Construction Materials
about.intro1: Our company was established to serve the construction sector in Kuwait and the GCC, providing integrated solutions in waterproofing, thermal, and acoustic insulation. We work with over 100 local companies and take pride in our clients' trust, built on quality, commitment, and transparency.
about.intro2: Our team comprises skilled technicians and engineers specialized in insulation works, trained on the latest global technologies and materials. We use high-quality materials and adhere to safety and quality standards in every project.

about.missionDesc: To provide integrated and reliable insulation solutions that meet our clients' needs, with commitment to quality, transparency, and post-execution service.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Integrated solutions in waterproofing, thermal, and acoustic insulation with the highest quality standards

basement.title: Basement & Cellar Insulation
basement.desc: We provide integrated solutions for insulating basements and cellars from moisture and water leaks. We use high-quality, waterproof materials that ensure long-term building protection.
basement.img1Alt: Basement surface preparation, drilling, and treatment

foundations.title: Foundation Insulation
foundations.desc: We deliver specialized foundation and footing waterproofing to shield buildings from moisture, groundwater, and soil-side leaks. We rely on high-grade materials and precise execution for long-term protection and structural stability.
benefits: Waterproofing foundations and footings against moisture and groundwater

roofs.title: Roof, Annex, Bathroom & Kitchen Insulation
roofs.desc: Comprehensive insulation for roofs, annexes, bathrooms, and kitchens against heat and moisture. We help maintain comfort and reduce energy use.

subsection1.title: Surface preparation & treatment
subsection1.intro: We prepare every roof carefully before insulation: certified cementitious work, testing, and professional screeding for perfect adhesion and long-term performance.
items: Cementitious surface treatment to prime the roof for insulation
Surface preparation and strengthening before application
Roof water testing to detect leaks before insulation
Screed pouring for accurate leveling and a true plane

subsection2.title: Roof insulation & protection systems
subsection2.intro: Specialized insulation and protection using trusted materials and modern methods—shielding the building from water and heat while saving energy.
items: Jitarov coating for waterproofing and protection
Jitarov Kirby coating for durability and long-term protection
Roof foam pour for thermal insulation and energy savings
American spray-applied roof insulation with proven techniques

bitumen.title: Thermal insulation (bitumen rolls)
bitumen.desc: We deliver advanced waterproofing using bitumen rolls to shield buildings from moisture and leaks, with top-tier execution quality.
bitumen.desc2: Bitumen roll waterproofing is one of the most common solutions, providing effective protection for roofs, basements, annexes, bathrooms, and kitchens—helping preserve structural integrity.
bitumen.desc3: We install 4 mm membranes (200/250 polyester) after surface preparation and primer application for full adhesion, then apply a protective layer for long life and high performance.
benefits: High resistance to water and moisture
Suitable for many roof and wet-area applications

pools.title: Swimming Pool Insulation
pools.desc: Professional insulation for swimming pools to prevent leaks and ensure continuous operation. We use specialized materials resistant to water and chlorine.

tanks.title: Water Tank & Garden Insulation
tanks.desc: Protecting water tanks and gardens from leaks and corrosion with specialized insulation materials. We ensure water safety and structure protection.
tanks.img1Alt: Water tank — full view of structure and access ladder
tanks.img2Alt: Water tank — secondary view showing details and access

acDucts.title: AC & Duct Insulation
acDucts.desc: Insulating air conditioning and ventilation systems (AC units and ducts) to improve efficiency and reduce energy consumption. We use high-quality thermal insulation materials.

acoustic.title: Acoustic Insulation
acoustic.desc: Acoustic insulation solutions for buildings and rooms to achieve comfort and tranquility. We offer suitable solutions for homes, offices, and mosques.

services.ctaText: Our team is ready to answer your inquiries and provide a free inspection
